shortAnswer: CA 125 is mainly measured in connection with the ovaries, but also rises with many benign conditions like endometriosis, menstruation, or ovarian cysts. An elevated value alone is not a cancer diagnosis and is always assessed together with imaging and symptoms.
metaDescription: CA 125 elevated? Possible causes and next steps explained simply.
causesElevated: Ovarian cancer (one of several possible causes)
doctorQuestions: Which benign causes apply to me?
